title: Drug driving lab and toxicology chain missing
offenceWording: Driving with specified controlled drug over limit
mainIssue: The case summary gives a drug level but toxicology continuity and lab certificate are not served.
uncertainEvidence: whether sample chain and result are admissibly proved
expectedTodayIssue: Chase toxicology and sample continuity; keep result provisional.
expectedSummaryRisk: A summary drug level is not enough without lab and continuity records.
polishOnlyWarnings: technical items can be grouped under toxicology
